event: Artists' celebration after Akseli Gallen-Kallela's 50th birthday
description: A group portrait of a formal dinner party showing numerous men and women gathered around a long white-clothed table laden with fruit and flowers. The guests wear formal early twentieth-century attire — men in dark suits, women in light dresses and hats. Some figures are animated in conversation while others look toward the viewer. The scene is warmly lit from above, with a crowd of standing figures in the background. The painting captures the convivial atmosphere of a celebratory gathering.
